bird.name: Crested ant tanager
bird.summary: The crested ant tanager (Driophlox cristata) is a bird in the family Cardinalidae that is endemic to Colombia. It was formerly placed with…

relations.subject: Crested ant tanager
relations.evidence: It inhabits the understorey of humid mid-level and montane forest
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Crested ant tanager
relations.evidence: The IUCN has assessed the crested ant-tanager as being of Least Concern. It occurs in several protected areas, but "numbers are undoubtedly declining; it has experienced considerable range contraction and fragmentation because of deforestation, and should probably be regarded as being at risk in the near future."
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
